About Me
02
I shoot.
I edit.
I deliver.
I'm Dev Vadodariya, a self-taught cinematographer and video editor based in Vadodara. Every video I make — from punchy product commercials to intimate short films — is shot, edited, and color-graded entirely by me.

I work with whatever the story demands — DSLR, mirrorless, iPhone, drone — because gear doesn't make great visuals, vision does.
Premiere Pro DaVinci Resolve CapCut DSLR / Mirrorless iPhone GoPro Drone

How I Work
05
FROM IDEA TO
final cut
Simple. Transparent.
Always on time.
01
Consultation
We talk about your project, goals, budget, and vision. Free 15-min call or WhatsApp — no commitment needed.
Free call
02
Plan & Shoot
I plan the shots, locations, and lighting. Then we shoot — fast, professional, and stress-free for you.
On location
03
Edit & Grade
I cut, sync, add music, and color grade the footage in DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro to match your brand's mood.
2–3 days
04
Deliver
You get the final video in HD, optimized for Instagram Reels, YouTube, or any platform. Ready to post immediately.
Ready to post
Start Your Project →
Services
06
01
Short Film Production
Concept to final cut. Cinematic storytelling with emotional depth and visual precision.
02
Product Commercials
High-impact product videos that convert. Bold visuals, clean edits, client-ready results.
03
Reel Editing
Scroll-stopping, fast-paced reels optimized for Instagram and social media.
04
Color Grading
Professional color work using DaVinci Resolve. Every mood. Every tone. Done right.
